scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator ./.source-original --output ./src --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 1 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.5 --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --string-array-threshold 1 --self-defending true --debug-protection true --identifier-names-generator mangled-shuffled --rename-globals false --transform-object-keys true --unicode-escape-sequence false
